Eureka Robotics raises $10.5M Series A to expand Physical AI products for precision manufacturing & logistics. Expanding operations in Singapore, Japan, and US market.
news.summary: Eureka Robotics, a Singaporean start-up, has announced significant progress in the development and launch of their key products, the Eureka Controller and Eureka 3D Camera. This advancement has expanded their operations in Singapore and Japan, positioning them for a successful entry into the lucrative US market. The company is striving to maximize its potential and reach a wider customer base with these flagship products.

news.headline: Drew Nelson OBE joins Finchetto to boost energy-efficient AI with optical passive network switch. Awards: 'Hottest European Pre-seed Company' and winner of Deeptech Demo Day 2024.
news.summary: A London-based company, Finchetto, pioneering the development of the world’s initial fully-optical passive network switch for energy-efficient artificial intelligence, has appointed Drew Nelson OBE as a Non-Executive Director. Drew, a recipient of multiple accolades, recently joined the Board. In November, Finchetto was honored with the title of ‘Hottest European Pre-seed Company’ at The Europas Awards and triumphed over 250 start-ups to emerge as the champion of Deeptech Demo Day 2024. Dr. Drew Nelson FREng, FInstP, DSc OBE brings significant expertise to the company.

news.headline: Fujitsu launches AI agent for frontline workplaces with top accuracy & extended video processing capability.
news.summary: A groundbreaking technology has been unveiled in Kawasaki, Japan on December 12, 2024. Fujitsu has introduced a video analytics AI agent designed for frontline workplaces, boasting world-leading accuracy and significantly extended video duration processing capabilities. This cutting-edge AI agent utilizes spatial video analysis to enhance performance, marking a significant advancement in the field.

news.headline: Infosys partners with RheinEnergie to aid enterprises in achieving up to 30-40% energy efficiency boost.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, on December 12, 2024, Infosys (NSE: INFY), (BSE: INFY), (NYSE: INFY) announced a partnership aimed at enhancing energy efficiency for enterprises. By utilizing Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz, the collaboration strives to help businesses achieve a significant increase in energy efficiency ranging between 30% to 40%. This initiative is designed to assist companies in meeting their decarbonization objectives, addressing environmental concerns, and promoting sustainable practices.

news.summary: In 2021, Asahi Net became the pioneer in implementing the SG-Tera II, making it the first CSP to do so.

news.headline: New rule caps overdraft fees at big banks - could save Americans billions yearly; future uncertain under Trump admin.
news.summary: It is uncertain if the regulation, potentially saving Americans billions of dollars in fees annually, will persist once President-elect Donald J. Trump resumes office.

news.headline: ZEISS & Mindpeak collaborate in Hamburg to enhance Multiplex Immunofluorescence solutions for pathology.- Key Players: ZEISS, Mindpeak- Focus: AI-powered pathology solutions- Integration: Multiplex Immunofluorescence solution- Target Audience: Pathologists for research, diagnostics, and clinical applications
news.summary: In Hamburg, Germany, ZEISS has collaborated with Mindpeak, a leader in AI-driven pathology solutions, to create a unified Multiplex Immunofluorescence (mIF) solution for pathologists in various fields. This partnership combines Mindpeak’s AI proficiency in analyzing pathological tissue images, including established algorithms for clinical use, with ZEISS’s cutting-edge instruments and software for research purposes. This collaboration aims to benefit pathologists in research, diagnostics, and clinical settings, enhancing their capabilities with advanced technology.

news.headline: Endace launches 100 Gbps EndaceProbe for zero-loss packet capture in compact 1RU form.
news.summary: Endace has introduced the EndaceProbe, capable of capturing packets at 100 Gbps. This device offers continuous, ultra-reliable, and zero-loss packet capture in a stackable, compact 1RU form factor. The EndaceProbe is designed to provide efficient packet capturing capabilities for high-speed networks, catering to the demands of modern data processing and analysis.

news.headline: Psychedelics could boost CEO leadership skills, with a cottage industry believing mind-altering drugs can help.
news.summary: An emerging cottage industry is focused on the belief that using mind-altering substances can enhance leadership in the business world.

news.headline: Javier Milei curbs inflation in Argentina after a year as president, amidst mixed reactions for his tough measures.
news.summary: Since taking office as president one year ago, Javier Milei has garnered praise both domestically and internationally for effectively managing the rampant inflation in Argentina. Despite this success, Milei's economic strategies have led to significant challenges for the population, resulting in widespread hardship among the people.

news.summary: There are instances where professional assistance is not necessary to resolve travel mishaps. Here, four instances are highlighted where readers managed to secure refunds and solutions independently.

news.headline: 2024 China Mermaid Open Grand Final and Asian Cup at Atlantis Sanya, marks first Asian Cup for mermaid sports, paving way for internationalisation.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 12, 2024, the 2024 China Mermaid Open Grand Final and Asian Cup began at Atlantis Sanya. This first-ever Asian Cup for mermaid sports signifies a major step towards increased internationalization. The event is set to take place until December 13th, attracting attention from various regions and boasting significant numbers of participants and spectators.

news.headline: Celebree School of Bristow named Best Preschool in Prince William County, celebrates with exclusive tuition offer and holiday events.
news.summary: An acclaimed preschool in Bristow, Virginia, recently honored as the top pick by the community, is marking the occasion with special offerings. Celebree School of Bristow, renowned for its early childhood education services including infant and toddler care, is celebrating its prestigious award with an exclusive tuition discount. The school, known for its quality programs, is also hosting a series of engaging holiday events for children. On December 11, 2024, the celebration kicked off with news of their latest achievements.

news.headline: Halogen Ventures partners with Innovate Alabama to invest $10 million in female founders in Alabama.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 11, 2024, Halogen Ventures, a venture capital fund led by Jesse Draper that targets early stage startups with female founders, has revealed a significant new investment. Totaling $10 million, this funding initiative is specifically geared towards empowering the top female entrepreneurs, CEOs, and technology innovators in Alabama.

news.headline: AARP to present AgeTech innovations at CES 2025, featuring new CEO Dr. Myechia Minter-Jordan. Washington, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A new CEO, Dr. Myechia Minter-Jordan, will lead discussions on the future of aging and well-being at AARP. The organization is set to make a presence at CES 2025 in Washington, DC, shining a light on AgeTech trends. The event will highlight cutting-edge innovations from various startups and companies, indicating a focus on advancements in technology to support the aging population.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital named among top hospitals for maternity care by U.S. News & World Report in 2025. #Tampa #maternitycare
news.summary: Tampa General Hospital (TGH), located in Tampa, Florida, has been recognized for its dedication to offering top-quality maternity, childbirth, and postpartum services. As the sole academic health system affiliated with the university in the region, TGH has been honored as one of the Best Hospitals for the year 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the hospital's ongoing efforts to provide exceptional care in these areas.

news.headline: Google's quantum chip "Willow" raises concerns for Bitcoin as it can solve computations in under 5 minutes that would take supercomputers 10^25 years. This capability could potentially break Bitcoin's security. 1.1 million Bitcoins worth $110 billion remain to be mined.
news.summary: Google's Alphabet Inc. subsidiary revealed its new quantum chip, "Willow," which can perform computations incredibly fast, solving tasks that would take the fastest supercomputers 10^25 years to solve in under five minutes. This has raised concerns in the tech world about the potential threat to Bitcoin's security, as the chip's capabilities could theoretically impact Bitcoin's mining process. A user known as John Trades MBA even suggested that with Willow's power, Google could mine all the remaining 1.1 million Bitcoins worth $110 billion. The fear stems from the chip's ability to break Bitcoin's cryptographic security, which is fundamental to its decentralized structure. This development has sparked conversations about the influence of quantum computing on cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin.

news.headline: Texas REALTORS® CEO Travis Kessler retiring on March 31, 2025; EVP Mike Barnett named new CEO.
news.summary: A real estate industry veteran is set to retire by the end of March 2025. The Texas REALTORS® have declared that President and CEO Travis Kessler will step down on March 31, 2025. Following this announcement, Executive Vice President Mike Barnett has been appointed as the new CEO. This change in leadership was announced on December 11, 2024, in Austin, Texas.

Advantech introduces Hailo-8 powered AI acceleration modules EAI-1200 and EAI-3300 with up to 52 TOPS AI performance.
news.summary: In Taiwan on December 12, 2024, Advantech (stock symbol 2395 on the Taiwan Stock Exchange), a prominent company specializing in AIoT platforms and services, announced the launch of its new AI acceleration modules – the EAI-1200 and EAI-3300. These modules are equipped with Hailo-8™ AI processors and provide remarkable AI processing capabilities of up to 52 trillion operations per second (TOPS).

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: The SNB does not like negative interest rates.
Nasdaq soars above 20,000 post-inflation data; Alphabet jumps 5.5% after Gemini 2.0 reveal. Fear & Greed Index at 'Neutral'. Macy's falls by 1%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a positive shift in overall market sentiment on Wednesday, though it remained in the “Neutral” zone. U.S. stock market ended with mixed results as the Nasdaq Composite hit a record high. Macy’s Inc (NYSE:M) shares dropped around 1% following the release of third-quarter results. Meanwhile, Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) saw a 5.5% increase, potentially influenced by the unveiling of Gemini 2.0. Economic data indicated that the Consumer Price Index grew by 2.7% year-over-year in November 2024, surpassing the 2.6% reading from October. For the full article, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Menarini Group & MEDSIR collaborate on ADELA study to treat advanced ER+/HER2- breast cancer with ESR1 mutations.
news.summary: An international phase III trial called ADELA is underway in various countries, testing the combination of elacestrant and everolimus for the treatment of advanced ER+/HER2- breast cancer in patients with ESR1 mutations. The goal of the study is to prolong the time before disease progression occurs. This research was shared by the Menarini Group and MEDSIR at the San Francisco Medical Conference.

news.headline: Ciena to report Q4 earnings on Dec. 12. Analysts forecast 65 cents/share, down from 75 cents last year. Revenue expected at $1.1B. Price target raised to $82. Shares closed at $73.21, up 3.3%. Check Benzinga for full story.
news.summary: Ciena Corporation (NYSE:CIEN) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Thursday, December 12, before the market opens. Analysts anticipate the company, based in Hanover, Maryland, to post earnings of 65 cents per share for the quarter, a decrease from 75 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Ciena forecasts quarterly revenue of $1.1 billion, slightly lower than the $1.13 billion recorded a year ago, according to data from Benzinga Pro. Stifel analyst Ruben Roy reaffirmed Ciena as a Buy on Tuesday, boosting the price target from $75 to $82. Following this news, Ciena's stock closed at $73.21 on Wednesday, marking a 3.3% increase. For more details, interested parties can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ifo: If the German economy fails to overcome structural challenges, only 0.4% growth vs. 1.1% if the right economic policy course is set.
ifo Institute forecasts growth between 0.4% and 1.1% for Germany in 2025.
